_meta.notes: Book I, Chapter 2 — A Name in the Dust. The first known wonder fires more often. The Choristers' singing carries further than usual.

title: A Name in the Dust
theme: a name is being whispered in places no one whispered before
worldEvent: Choristers in the Salt Cathedral begin a long song that lasts three nights
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK I, CHAPTER 2: A NAME IN THE DUST. A name no one knows is being whispered close to the player's perception more often than is comfortable. The Choristers in the Salt Cathedral have begun a long, low song; if the player is inland, they cannot hear it but the silence underneath their day has a shape. Don't name the name.
